nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 鸨形目
nodes.summary: 鸨形目（Otidiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如大鸨、Arabian bustard、灰颈鹭鸨等26种鸟类。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Southern black korhaan
nodes.summary: Southern black korhaan（Southern black korhaan，学名 Afrotis afra），分类上属于鸨形目，并归入鸨科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 開普敦
nodes.summary: 開普敦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Southern black korhaan、Fynbos buttonquail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联38种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等38种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 马坎达
nodes.summary: 马坎达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Southern black korhaan，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸨科
nodes.summary: 鸨科（Otididae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如大鸨、Arabian bustard、灰颈鹭鸨等26种鸟类。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 南非
nodes.summary: 南非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、非洲黑鴨、Shelley's francolin等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The southern black korhaan (Afrotis afra), also known as the black bustard, is a species of bird in the bustard family, Otididae. This small bustard is found in southwestern South Africa, from Namaqualand, south to Cape Town and east to Makhanda. It prefers semi-arid habitats such as grasslands, shrublands and savannas where it can easily prey on ground-dwelling arthropods and eat seeds.{{Cite journal|last1=Kok|first1=O

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: A.|date=1990-12-01|title=Diet of the Black Korhaan Eupodotis Afra in the Orange Free State and North-West Cape|journal=Ostrich|volume=61|issue=3–4|pages=107–110|doi=10.1080/00306525.1990.9634155|issn=0030-6525}} It reproduces yearly in the spring and will lay about one or two eggs per breeding season. Numbers have declined rapidly as much of its habitat has been converted to agricultural land and remaining tracts are often fragmented. Due to this habitat destruction, the species is considered vulnerable by the IUCN Red List

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Recent studies have shown that the southern black korhaan's population has been decreasing lately, which has raised concerns about its conservation status. The species was once very common but it is now becoming rarer as its habitat is being fragmented. Hence, it has been deemed vulnerable by the IUCN Red List of threatened species since October 1, 2016. The primary threat to these species is the conversion of natural vegetation to agricultural lands as well as aquaculture. This has caused habitat fragmentation and a reduction in available food sources. This reduction in habitat also means less suitable breeding grounds, which has not only affected breeding success, but chick and egg survival rates. Indeed, agricultural lands do not provide sufficient plant cover to protect them from predators such as the pied crow. Other threats include climate change, human disturbance and diseases
